document.source_title: Australia becomes the 30th country to eliminate trachoma as a public health problem

claims.claim_text: Australia has eliminated trachoma as a public health problem.
claims.evidence_text: The World Health Organization (WHO) has validated Australia for eliminating trachoma as a public health problem.

entities.name: trachoma
entities.description: The world’s leading infectious cause of blindness, caused by the bacterium Chlamydia trachomatis.
entities.evidence_text: Trachoma, the world’s leading infectious cause of blindness, no longer represents a public health problem in the country.
